caption: A news segment features two men seated in an indoor room with red chairs and a gold-colored coffee table between them. The man on the left wears a white robe and a white face mask, while the man on the right wears a white robe and a traditional blue and white patterned cap. A small Nigerian flag is placed on the table. In the background, red curtains and architectural pillars are visible. The scene remains static across the frames, with the men sitting in conversation. Overlaid on the bottom of the screen is a purple bar with the text "PLUS POLITICS" and a larger white banner reading "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU". Various logos appear, including "plustv", "DStv CH 408", and "StarTimes CH 308". Social media icons and the text "FOLLOW US" and "PLUSTVAFRICA" are also present, along with "WATCH ON" and "WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV" in the final segments.
